The fact of the matter is if 70+percent of the population is white then 70+ percent of your s-tier creatives will be. And if >30% of your BIPOC ppl are black then it's gonna be even less, AND ESPECIALLY when you consider class and wealth disparity and things like nepotism etc. then the amount of gigachad black creators is VERY small. They simply can't math and don't know how to interpret statistics without applying racist CRT pseudoscience ideology to it. They are no different than the nazis with their "scientific/biological racism"

Also the CRAZIEST part?! The way they "fix" it is fast tracking activists that are trained in "media literacy" and other nonsense (which is usually just CRT anti-white racism and oppressor narrative) which only divides and alienates ppl and actually harms the groups they are trying to artifically "elevate" (in quotations cuz the reality is they were already equal decades ago) when the reality is white men fought just as hard or HARDER to give black people their rightful equality cuz it was the right thing to do smfh!

It was literally truth justice and the American way and they want to undermine and sabotage it for WHAT?! Marxist BS?! Nah, *f*ck. that.*

Beleive it or not gender-swappingis also DEI.

replies.author: @azroadie
replies.text:
​​@osarumenerhunmwunsee just proves you dont know what DEI means.   Replacing males with females and never the other way around, with no continuity, no real backstory, IS DEI.   I've been reading comics for 50 years.

Black panther was DEI'ed by replacing a male with a female, and chadwick Boseman was one of my favorite marvel actors.    Captain marvel was also originally a male, ETC.   So get over it captain bigot.
